contents: From HoTT Require Import Basics Types Truncations.Core.
From HoTT Require Import Basics Types Truncations.Core.
From HoTT.WildCat Require Import Core Universe Opposite Bifunctor.
Require Import AbSES.Pullback AbSES.Pushout AbSES.BaerSum AbSES.Core.
(** * The set [Ext B A] of abelian group extensions *)
Definition Ext (B A : AbGroup@{u}) := pTr 0 (AbSES B A).
(** An extension [E : AbSES B A] is trivial in [Ext B A] if and only if [E] merely splits. *)

goals.conclusion:
merely {s : GroupHomomorphism B E & projection E $o s == idmap} <~>
tr E = point (Ext B A)

merely {s : GroupHomomorphism B E & projection E $o s == idmap} <~>
tr E = point (Ext B A)

merely {s : GroupHomomorphism B E & projection E $o s == idmap} <~>
Tr (-1) (E = point (AbSES B A))

contents: Definition Ext' (B A : AbGroup@{u}) := Tr 0 (AbSES' B A).
(** [Ext B A] is an abelian group for any [A B : AbGroup]. The proof of commutativity is a bit faster if we separate out the proof that [Ext B A] is a group. *)

goals.conclusion: Ext B A -> Ext B A
forall y z : Ext B A, E + (y + z) = E + y + z

contents: all: strip_truncations; unfold mon_unit, point; apply (ap tr).

goals.conclusion: abses_baer_sum E (abses_baer_sum F G) = abses_baer_sum (abses_baer_sum E F) G
abses_baer_sum (abses_pullback (- grp_homo_id) E) E = point (AbSES B A)
abses_baer_sum E (abses_pullback (- grp_homo_id) E) = point (AbSES B A)
abses_baer_sum E (abses_baer_sum F G) = abses_baer_sum (abses_baer_sum E F) G
abses_baer_sum (abses_pullback (- grp_homo_id) E) E = point (AbSES B A)
abses_baer_sum E (abses_pullback (- grp_homo_id) E) = point (AbSES B A)

contents: Definition ab_ext@{u v|u < v} `{Univalence} (B : AbGroup@{u}^op) (A : AbGroup@{u}) : AbGroup@{v}.

goals.conclusion: tr (abses_baer_sum E F) = tr (abses_baer_sum F E)
abses_baer_sum E F = abses_baer_sum F E
ab_ext B a $-> ab_ext B b
ab_ext B a -> ab_ext B b

forall y : ab_ext B a,
fmap (pTr 0 o AbSES B) f (tr E0 + y) =
fmap (pTr 0 o AbSES B) f (tr E0) + fmap (pTr 0 o AbSES B) f y

fmap (pTr 0 o AbSES B) f (tr E0 + tr E1) =
fmap (pTr 0 o AbSES B) f (tr E0) + fmap (pTr 0 o AbSES B) f (tr E1)

abses_pushout f (abses_baer_sum E0 E1) =
abses_baer_sum (abses_pushout f E0) (abses_pushout f E1)

contents:
Instance is0functor_abext10 `{Univalence} (A : AbGroup)
  : Is0Functor (fun B : AbGroup^op => ab_ext B A).

goals.conclusion: Is0Functor (fun B : AbGroup^op => ab_ext B A)
Is0Functor (fun B : AbGroup^op => ab_ext B A)
grp_ext a A -> grp_ext b A

contents: 1: exact (fmap (fun (B : AbGroup^op) => Ext B A) f).

goals.conclusion: IsSemiGroupPreserving (fmap (pTr 0 o (fun x : AbGroup^op => AbSES x A)) f)

forall y : grp_ext a A,
fmap (pTr 0 o (fun x : AbGroup^op => AbSES x A)) f (tr E0 + y) =
fmap (pTr 0 o (fun x : AbGroup^op => AbSES x A)) f (tr E0) +
fmap (pTr 0 o (fun x : AbGroup^op => AbSES x A)) f y

fmap (pTr 0 o (fun x : AbGroup^op => AbSES x A)) f (tr E0 + tr E1) =
fmap (pTr 0 o (fun x : AbGroup^op => AbSES x A)) f (tr E0) +
fmap (pTr 0 o (fun x : AbGroup^op => AbSES x A)) f (tr E1)

abses_pullback f (abses_baer_sum E0 E1) =
abses_baer_sum (abses_pullback f E0) (abses_pullback f E1)

forall (a b : AbGroup) (f g : a $-> b),
f $== g -> fmap (ab_ext B) f $== fmap (ab_ext B) g
forall a : AbGroup, fmap (ab_ext B) (Id a) $== Id (ab_ext B a)

forall (a b c : AbGroup) (f : a $-> b) (g : b $-> c),
fmap (ab_ext B) (g $o f) $== fmap (ab_ext B) g $o fmap (ab_ext B) f

forall (a b : AbGroup) (f g : a $-> b),
f $== g -> fmap (ab_ext B) f $== fmap (ab_ext B) g
f $== g -> fmap (ab_ext B) f $== fmap (ab_ext B) g
forall a : AbGroup, fmap (ab_ext B) (Id a) $== Id (ab_ext B a)

forall (a b c : AbGroup) (f : a $-> b) (g : b $-> c),
fmap (ab_ext B) (g $o f) $== fmap (ab_ext B) g $o fmap (ab_ext B) f

forall (f : A $-> C) (g : C $-> D),
fmap (ab_ext B) (g $o f) $== fmap (ab_ext B) g $o fmap (ab_ext B) f

contents:
Instance is1functor_abext10 `{Univalence} (A : AbGroup)
  : Is1Functor (fun B : AbGroup^op => ab_ext B A).

goals.conclusion: Is1Functor (fun B : AbGroup^op => ab_ext B A)
Is1Functor (fun B : AbGroup^op => ab_ext B A)

forall (a b : AbGroup^op) (f g : a $-> b),
f $== g ->
fmap (fun B : AbGroup^op => ab_ext B A) f $==
fmap (fun B : AbGroup^op => ab_ext B A) g

forall a : AbGroup^op,
fmap (fun B : AbGroup^op => ab_ext B A) (Id a) $==
Id ((fun B : AbGroup^op => ab_ext B A) a)

forall (a b c : AbGroup^op) (f : a $-> b) (g : b $-> c),
fmap (fun B : AbGroup^op => ab_ext B A) (g $o f) $==
fmap (fun B : AbGroup^op => ab_ext B A) g $o
fmap (fun B : AbGroup^op => ab_ext B A) f

forall (a b : AbGroup^op) (f g : a $-> b),
f $== g ->
fmap (fun B : AbGroup^op => ab_ext B A) f $==
fmap (fun B : AbGroup^op => ab_ext B A) g

f $== g ->
fmap (fun B0 : AbGroup^op => ab_ext B0 A) f $==
fmap (fun B0 : AbGroup^op => ab_ext B0 A) g

contents: exact (fmap2 (fun B : AbGroup^op => Ext B A)).

goals.conclusion:
forall a : AbGroup^op,
fmap (fun B : AbGroup^op => ab_ext B A) (Id a) $==
Id ((fun B : AbGroup^op => ab_ext B A) a)

contents: exact (fmap_id (fun B : AbGroup^op => Ext B A)).

goals.conclusion:
forall (a b c : AbGroup^op) (f : a $-> b) (g : b $-> c),
fmap (fun B : AbGroup^op => ab_ext B A) (g $o f) $==
fmap (fun B : AbGroup^op => ab_ext B A) g $o
fmap (fun B : AbGroup^op => ab_ext B A) f

forall (f : B $-> C) (g : C $-> D),
fmap (fun B0 : AbGroup^op => ab_ext B0 A) (g $o f) $==
fmap (fun B0 : AbGroup^op => ab_ext B0 A) g $o
fmap (fun B0 : AbGroup^op => ab_ext B0 A) f

contents: exact (fmap_comp (fun B : AbGroup^op => Ext B A)).

goals.conclusion: forall b : AbGroup, Is1Functor (flip ab_ext b)

forall (a0 a1 : AbGroup^op) (f : a0 $-> a1) (b0 b1 : AbGroup)
(g : b0 $-> b1),
fmap01 ab_ext a1 g $o fmap10 ab_ext f b0 $==
fmap10 ab_ext f b1 $o fmap01 ab_ext a0 g

forall (a0 a1 : AbGroup^op) (f : a0 $-> a1) (b0 b1 : AbGroup)
(g : b0 $-> b1),
fmap01 ab_ext a1 g $o fmap10 ab_ext f b0 $==
fmap10 ab_ext f b1 $o fmap01 ab_ext a0 g

forall (f : A $-> B) (b0 b1 : AbGroup) (g : b0 $-> b1),
fmap01 ab_ext B g $o fmap10 ab_ext f b0 $==
fmap10 ab_ext f b1 $o fmap01 ab_ext A g

contents: (** We can push out a fixed extension while letting the map vary, and this defines a group homomorphism. *)

goals.conclusion: ab_hom A G -> ab_ext B G

contents: 1: exact (fun f => fmap01 (A:=AbGroup^op) Ext' _ f (tr E)).

goals.conclusion: IsSemiGroupPreserving (fun f : ab_hom A G => fmap01 Ext' B f (tr E))

tr (abses_pushout (sgop_hom f g) E) =
tr (abses_baer_sum (abses_pushout f E) (abses_pushout g E))

abses_pushout (sgop_hom f g) E =
abses_baer_sum (abses_pushout f E) (abses_pushout g E)

contents: (** ** Extensions ending in a projective are trivial *)

goals.conclusion: forall (A : AbGroup) (E : AbSES P A), tr E = point (Ext P A)
forall (A : AbGroup) (E : AbSES P A), tr E = point (Ext P A)
merely {s : GroupHomomorphism P E & projection E $o s == idmap}

contents: (** It follows that when [P] is projective, [Ext P A] is contractible. *)
(* Conversely, if all extensions ending in [P] are trivial, then [P] is projective. *)

Proposition abext_projective_trivial `{Univalence} (P : AbGroup)
  (ext_triv : forall A, forall E : AbSES P A, tr E = point (Ext P A))
  : IsAbProjective P.

hypotheses.type: forall (A : AbGroup) (E : AbSES P A), tr E = point (Ext P A)
forall (A : AbGroup) (E : AbSES P A), tr E = point (Ext P A)
forall (A : AbGroup) (E : AbSES P A), tr E = point (Ext P A)

goals.conclusion: merely {s : P $-> E & p $o s == grp_homo_id}

hypotheses.type: forall (A : AbGroup) (E0 : AbSES P A), tr E0 = point (Ext P A)
forall (A : AbGroup) (E0 : AbSES P A), tr E0 = point (Ext P A)
